name: figma
description: Figma workflows for design implementation, Code Connect mappings, and design system rule generation.

interface.shortDescription: Design-to-code workflows powered by the Figma integration
interface.longDescription: Figma workflows for implementing designs in code, creating Code Connect mappings between published Figma components and source files, and generating project-specific design system rules for repeatable Figma-to-code work.
interface.defaultPrompt: Inspect a Figma design and implement it in code
